query: SELECT trial cervical cancer brachytherapy outcomes FIGO IB1

results.title: Pre-operative high-dose-rate brachytherapy in early-stage cervical cancer: long-term single-center results.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 35233234. 2022/02/01 00:00. PURPOSE: The aim of the study was to report the outcomes of pre-operative 
high-dose-rate brachytherapy (pHDR-BT), followed by hysterectomy in patients 
with early cervical cancer.
MATERIAL AND METHODS: From January, 1998 to December, 2003, 113 women with IB1, 
IB2, and IIA1 cervical cancer (according to International Federation of 
Gynecology and Obstetrics [FIGO] 2018) were treated with pHDR-BT, and 6 to 8 
weeks later followed by radical hysterectomy. Pa
